dataset: Synthea synthetic patient data - Massachusetts cohort

pi_items.verified_value: Dynamically seeded via setup_task.sh: INSERT INTO rx_list for pid=10 with Lisinopril 5mg, rxl_date_inactive=NULL (active)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 15-17: Seeds Lisinopril 5mg as active medication for task

pi_items.verified_value: Dynamically seeded via setup_task.sh: INSERT INTO rx_list for pid=10 with Amlodipine 5mg, rxl_date_inactive=NULL (active)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 20-22: Seeds Amlodipine 5mg as active medication for task

privileged_info_summary: Task uses synthetic patient data from Synthea generator. Patient PID 10 (Sherill Botsford, DOB January 24, 1995, Female) is a synthetic patient generated by Synthea from the Massachusetts cohort. Pre-admission antihypertensive medications (Lisinopril 5mg and Amlodipine 5mg) are dynamically seeded for this specific task to simulate post-hospitalization medication reconciliation. All data is non-real and generated for testing purposes.
